metadata.title: Ventrio — learn entrepreneurship by doing
metadata.description: Ventrio — daily quests, video lessons and live Play sessions that turn an interest in business into real experience.

landing.title: Learn entrepreneurship through action.
landing.subtitle: No boring theory or hour-long lectures here. Just 1 practical challenge a day that builds business thinking.
landing.step1Description: No boring theory. Just a concrete action you can complete today.
landing.step2Description: Pick a pace that fits you — no burnout, no pressure.
landing.step3Description: Build entrepreneurial instinct step by step, not from a textbook.

auth.loginSubtitle: Log in to continue your daily challenge.
auth.signupSubtitle: Start with one small challenge a day.
auth.checkEmailDescription: We sent a confirmation link to finish creating your account.
auth.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
auth.consentRequired: You need to accept the Terms of Use and Privacy Policy.
auth.googleConsentValidation: Please accept the Terms of Use and Privacy Policy first.
auth.googleConsentNotice: By continuing with Google, you agree to the Terms of Use and Privacy Policy.
auth.resendRateLimited: Too many attempts. Wait a bit and try again.
auth.resendAlreadyConfirmed: This email is already confirmed — you can log in.
auth.googleSignInFailed: Google sign-in could not be completed. Please try again in the same browser.

onboarding.title: Tell us about yourself
onboarding.subtitle: This helps us tailor your daily challenges.
onboarding.interestsQuestion: What do you want to improve?
onboarding.timeQuestion: How much time can you spend per day?
onboarding.selectTime: Choose how much time you can spend per day.
onboarding.loadingPhrase3: 🔮 AI is generating your personal track in Ventrio...
onboarding.errorSession: Your session expired. Please log in again.
onboarding.errorSaveFailed: Couldn't save your answers. Please try again.

tour.goalBody: Your goal: build a real project step by step — Ventrio guides you from idea to pitch.
tour.offerTitle: Ready to build your first project?
tour.offerBody: Choose a direction and Ventrio will guide you from idea to pitch.
tour.dashboardMessage: Your progress, streak, and what to do next — all in one place.
tour.learnMessage: Lessons, interactive modules, challenges, and a glossary — for when you need to learn something.
tour.buildMessage: Create and develop a real project — this is where you turn an idea into a pitch.
tour.workshopsMessage: Practise through live quizzes and simulations.
tour.profileMessage: Your personal progress, XP, and results.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.description: Your daily progress shows up here.
dashboard.watchLesson: Open a lesson and note one useful idea
dashboard.allQuestsDoneDescription: Incredible result. Check back later — we're preparing new quests.
dashboard.weakDimensionHelp: This quest will help you improve exactly that.
dashboard.challengeZeroPrompt: Come up with a bold, wild name for your future project or startup, using just two of your favorite words.
dashboard.personalizedSubtitle: We've set up a track based on your interests: {interests}. Start with a quick warm-up 👇
dashboard.genericSubtitle: Start with a quick warm-up while we set up the rest of your track 👇
dashboard.workshopsTeaserBody: We'll let you know as soon as the first Play session is up.
dashboard.activityFeedEmpty: Your first wins will show up here once you complete at least one quest.
dashboard.buildTeaserBody: Turn an interest into a real project — problem, first version, and a pitch you can actually give.
dashboard.buildAllTasksDone: All tasks done — check your pitch

challenges.title: Challenges
challenges.descriptionPersonalized: Picked for your interests — choose one and start.
challenges.descriptionGeneric: Complete onboarding to see a personalized selection. For now, here are all challenges.
challenges.warmupHint: This is a warm-up — just try putting the thought into your own words 🙂
challenges.aiValidationHint: Ventrio AI will check depth, feasibility, and risk awareness — be specific, no "dunno" answers 🙂
challenges.reflectionPlaceholder: Write it as it is, no polishing...
challenges.checkingAi: 🤖 Ventrio AI is analyzing how viable your answer is...

learn.title: Learn
learn.description: Video lessons, interactive courses, and a glossary of terms — all in one place.
learn.videosNote: These are full-length lectures of varying length — you don't have to finish one. Watch a few minutes and jot down one useful idea.
learn.glossaryNoResults: No results for "{query}". Try a different term.

courses.lessonClosedNote: "{title}" complete. The next node on the map is now unlocked.
courses.pricingNoDemand: Not a single customer. The price is too scary.
courses.pricingLoss: You went into the red because of high costs!
courses.pricingSuccess: That's it — the price with maximum profit! Hypothesis confirmed.
courses.pricingSuboptimal: Profitable, but not the maximum. There's a better price out there — try the slider again.

build.landingTitle: Build a real project step by step.
build.landingSubtitle: Choose a direction, test your idea, create the first version and prepare to pitch it.
build.newProjectDescription: A few quick questions shape the roadmap you'll follow — this takes about 2 minutes.
build.errorSelectRequired: Please answer every question before continuing.
build.modeStandardHint: The full guided path from direction to pitch.
build.modeQuickSprintHint: A condensed 5-step path: problem, audience, solution, risk, pitch — about 10–15 minutes.
build.nameHint: Optional — you can name it later.
build.startingEarlyVersion: I already have an early version
build.audienceHint: A short answer is fine — "not sure yet" works too.
build.audiencePlaceholder: e.g. high schoolers preparing for exams
build.outcomeQuestion: What do you want out of this?
build.timeQuestion: How much time do you have per week?
build.reviewSubtitle: Check your answers — edit any of them, then create your project.

build.pitchEmptyNoTasks: Complete at least one task in your workspace first.

build.snapshotSubtitle: This is what your project is so far — built from your saved work.
build.tailorNoChange: Your tasks are already specific to your project.

workshops.displayNameHint: This is how other participants will see you

footer.rights: © {year} {productName}. An educational platform for building entrepreneurial thinking.

privacy.intro: This policy explains what data {productName} (the "Service") collects, why, and how it's handled. The Service is currently operated by {operatorName} ({operatorCountry}{operatorCityPart}). For any privacy questions, email {contactEmail}.

sections.title: What data we collect
sections.body:
• Signup data: email and password, or — if you sign in with Google — the email, name, and profile data Google shares with us with your consent.
• Profile data: display name, interests, and preferred daily study time, which you provide during onboarding.
• Learning progress: XP, activity streak, and Play session participation (answers, correctness, response time, points earned) — stored on our servers.
• Challenge answers and video reflection notes are stored ONLY locally in your browser (localStorage) and are not kept by us on an ongoing basis — except that challenge answer text is temporarily sent to an AI review service (see "Who we share data with" below).
• Technical data: session and authentication cookies, language preference, and standard infrastructure logs (see below).

sections.title: Why we use this data
sections.body: To create and secure your account, save your learning progress, power live Play sessions and leaderboards, improve the educational product, and respond to your support requests.

sections.title: Legal basis
sections.body: We process data based on the consent you give at signup (the required checkbox) and when signing in with Google (Google's own consent screen), and to the extent necessary to provide the Service itself.

sections.title: Who we share data with
sections.body:
We do not sell your data. To run the Service, we use the following technical partners (processors):
• Supabase — database, authentication, and account storage.
• Vercel — hosting and delivery of the app; keeps standard server request logs.
• Google OAuth — sign-in with your Google account.
• YouTube/Google — video lessons are embedded via the YouTube player; once you click "Play," Google may process viewing data according to its own privacy policy.
• Anthropic (Claude API) — the text of your challenge answer is temporarily sent to Anthropic for automated AI review and feedback; it is not used by Anthropic to train models under the commercial API, and we do not retain it linked to your identity after review.
Each of these partners may process data on servers located outside your country.

sections.title: International data transfers
sections.body: Because our processors (Supabase, Vercel, Google, Anthropic) are global services, data may be processed on servers in different countries. We aim to work only with partners that provide an adequate level of data protection.

sections.title: How long we keep data
sections.body: We keep account data for as long as your account is active. After account deletion (see the "Delete Account" page), server-side data tied to your profile is removed within a reasonable period. Data saved locally in your browser stays on your device until you clear it yourself.

sections.title: How we protect data
sections.body: We use standard security measures (encrypted connections, database-level access restrictions, token-based authorization). No service can guarantee absolute protection against every possible threat, but we aim to follow industry best practices.

sections.title: Your rights
Minors
sections.body: {productName} is built for users aged {minimumAge} and up. We deliberately avoid collecting unnecessary sensitive data (ID numbers, exact home address, payment details) and is not intended for children under {minimumAge}. If you become aware that a younger child has created an account, please contact us and we'll remove it.

sections.title: Changes to this policy
sections.body: We may update this policy as the Service evolves. The effective date is shown at the bottom of this page. We'll try to notify you of significant changes through the Service or via the email you registered with.

terms.intro: By using {productName} (the "Service"), you agree to these terms. If you don't agree, please don't use the Service.

sections.title: Acceptance of terms
sections.body: By registering for or using the Service, you confirm that you've read and accept these Terms of Use and the Privacy Policy.

sections.title: Minimum age
sections.body: The Service is intended for users aged {minimumAge} and up. By registering, you confirm you're at least {minimumAge}.

sections.title: Your account
sections.body: You're responsible for keeping your password secure and for all activity under your account. Let us know if you suspect unauthorized access to your account.

sections.title: Educational purpose
sections.body: {productName} is an educational platform for building entrepreneurial thinking. Challenges, simulations, Play sessions, and AI-generated feedback are for learning purposes only and are NOT financial, legal, or investment advice. Any business decisions you make are your own responsibility and risk.

sections.title: Acceptable use
sections.body: You may not: break the law, impersonate another person, attempt unauthorized access to the Service or other users' data, post abusive or harmful content, or use the Service to send spam.

sections.title: Conduct in Play sessions
sections.body: Play sessions are live, group sessions. Participants must treat each other respectfully; abuse, cheating, or disrupting a session may result in removal from the session or restricted access to the Service.

sections.title: Intellectual property
sections.body: The Service's content (text, design, challenges, courses) belongs to {productName} or its licensors and is protected by law. You may use it only for your own personal learning.

sections.title: Third-party content
sections.body: The Service uses embedded YouTube videos and Google OAuth sign-in. Using these features is also governed by the terms and policies of those services (Google/YouTube), which we don't control.

sections.title: Suspension and termination
sections.body: We may restrict or terminate account access for violations of these terms. You can delete your account at any time (see the "Delete Account" page).

sections.title: Disclaimer of warranties
sections.body: The Service is provided "as is," without warranties of any kind, express or implied. We don't guarantee uninterrupted operation, error-free performance, or that the Service will meet your specific expectations.

sections.title: Limitation of liability
sections.body: To the extent permitted by law, {productName} is not liable for indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from your use of the Service.

sections.title: Governing law
sections.body: The governing law and jurisdiction for these terms: {governingLaw}. This field is a placeholder and requires confirmation by the product owner before public launch.

cookies.intro: {productName} uses a minimal, mostly technically-necessary set of cookies and browser local storage — no advertising or marketing trackers.

sections.title: What we use
sections.body:
• Session/authentication cookies (Supabase) — needed to keep you signed in.
• Language cookie (NEXT_LOCALE) — remembers your chosen interface language.
• Browser local storage (localStorage) — stores your learning progress, guided-tour state, and answer drafts on your device so the Service is fast and resilient offline.

sections.title: Embedded YouTube videos
sections.body: Videos on the platform load on click — the YouTube player is only embedded on the page after you click "Play" yourself. After that, Google may set its own cookies and process viewing data according to its own privacy policy.

sections.title: Why there's no cookie consent banner
sections.body: Since we don't use advertising or analytics trackers, only technically-necessary cookies, we don't show an Accept/Reject banner — this page instead serves as the informational notice required by applicable law for technically-necessary cookies.

sections.title: Managing cookies
sections.body: You can clear cookies and local storage in your browser settings at any time — note that this will sign you out and reset progress saved locally on that device.

contact.intro: For anything — privacy questions, using the Service, technical support, or account deletion — reach out directly.
contact.responseNote: We try to respond within a reasonable time, but can't yet guarantee an exact response time.

deleteAccount.intro: You can request full deletion of your {productName} account and its associated data at any time.

whatGetsDeleted.title: What gets deleted
whatGetsDeleted.body: Once deletion is confirmed, we'll delete your sign-in account (email/Google) and all server-side data tied to it: your profile, interests, XP and activity streak, and Play session participation and answers.

whatStays.title: What isn't deleted automatically
whatStays.body: Challenge progress and video reflection notes are stored only locally in the browser on the devices you used. We can't remotely erase this data — you can do it yourself by clearing site data in your browser settings on each device.

howTo.title: How to request deletion
howTo.body: Right now, account deletion is handled manually by our team — there's no automatic "Delete now" button yet. Email {contactEmail} with the subject "Delete account" from the email address linked to your account (or include it in the message if you sign in with Google). We'll verify your identity and delete the account within a reasonable time.

deleteAccount.limitationNote: Note: account deletion isn't instant or fully automated — that's a deliberate choice, so we never delete data by mistake without confirmation.
